preconditions: Successful login redirects user to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Successful login with valid username and password
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated and browser is redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home. The home page loads successfully and the login page is no longer visible.

testCases.title: Login fails with incorrect username and correct password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected. The browser remains on the login page URL and a visible error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Login fails with correct username and incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected. The page remains at the login URL and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Login fails when username and password fields are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Submission is rejected. Required field validation messages are displayed for username and password and the user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login fails when username is blank and password is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not processed. A visible validation message indicates that the username field is required and the page remains on the login screen.

testCases.title: Login fails when password is blank and username is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not processed. A visible validation message indicates that the password field is required and the user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login page UI elements are visible
steps: Verify the Username input field is visible
Verify the Password input field is visible
Verify the Login button is visible
testCases.expectedResult: The login page loads successfully and the Username field, Password field, and Login button are clearly visible and interactable on the screen.

testCases.title: Login using Enter key instead of clicking Login button
steps: Press the Enter key on the keyboard
testCases.expectedResult: Form submission is triggered by the Enter key and the user is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Login with leading and trailing spaces in username
steps: Enter '  haklarr  ' in the Username field
testCases.expectedResult: Leading and trailing spaces in the username are ignored and the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Login with leading and trailing spaces in password
steps: Enter '  Icstunnel1  ' in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails because the password including spaces does not match the stored password. An invalid credentials error message is displayed and the page remains on the login screen.

testCases.title: Login attempt with extremely long username input
steps: Enter a username longer than 100 characters in the Username field
testCases.expectedResult: The system rejects the login attempt. The user remains on the login page and an error or validation message is displayed without UI layout breaking.

testCases.title: Login attempt with extremely long password input
steps: Enter a password longer than 100 characters in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and an invalid credentials or validation message is displayed while the browser remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login with special characters in username
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected. The login page remains displayed and an invalid username or password message appears.

testCases.title: Repeated clicking of Login button during submission
steps: Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication request is processed and the user is redirected a single time to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate navigation or UI errors.

testCases.title: Browser back navigation after successful login returns to authenticated home
steps: Use the browser Forward button or Home navigation control
testCases.expectedResult: The user session remains authenticated and navigation returns to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home with the home page UI visible.
